full_raw_transcription:
ODENT™ - NEW ERA OF DENTAL SOLUTIONS
Meril Dental Portfolio Reconstruction

1. Vizora™ (Diagnostic Imaging):
- Vizora 3DView (CBCT): State-of-the-art extra-oral imaging. Features largest FOV (23x18), IGZO sensor technology, TDI Ceph scan, up to 300 fps.
- Vizora ScanPro (Intraoral Scanner): Compact handheld 3D digital impressions. Fast arch scan (30s), 10µm accuracy, anti-fogging, wireless.
- Vizora FaceMap (Dental Face 3D Scanner): 3D facial analysis and AI-driven smile design. Structured light photogrammetry, 0.5mm accuracy.
- Vizora X-RaySense (RVG Sensor): APS CMOS technology, 2.34M pixels, IP68 dustproof/waterproof.
- Vizora RayGun (X-Ray Gun): Portable intraoral diagnostic device, high-resolution, long-lasting battery, 3.0" display.

2. Optra™ (Restorative Workflows):
- OptraDent RootPutty (Root Canal Putty): Bioactive bioceramic putty for repair and obturation. Washout resistant, pH > 12.5, 2-hour set time.
- OptraDent ResiKit (Dental Resin Kit): Direct restorative resin (Bis-GMA/TEGDMA) for anterior/posterior. High abrasion resistance, low shrinkage.
- OptraDent EtchPrime (Etchant Gel): 37% Phosphoric acid gel for enamel/dentin conditioning.
- OptraDent SealGuard (Pit & Fissure Sealant): Protective barrier for occlusal surfaces. Radiopaque, long-term durability.
- OptraDent BioSeal (Root Canal Bioceramic Sealer): Resin-free bioactive sealer for permanent obturation. High flowability, pH > 12.5.

3. Endovate™ (Endodontic Precision):
- Endovate FusionOne (Integrated Endo System): Motor + Apex Locator + GP Cutter + GP Filler + Ultrasonic Activator. 7" touch screen.
- Endovate MicroView (Surgical Microscope): Stepless zoom, high brightness LED, multi-color filters, variable zoom (200-450mm).
- Endovate Motix Pro (Endo Motor): Inbuilt apex locator, brushless motor, 360° mini contra angle, 9 programmable settings.
- Endovate ThermaFill (GP Obturation Filler): Bluetooth app connectivity, precise electric injection of gutta-percha.
- Endovate ObtuCut (GP Obturation Cutter): 360° ring switch, rapid heat-up, pre-bendable tips.

4. Prosthenix™ (Prosthetic Excellence / CAD-CAM):
- Prosthenix MillPro (Hybrid Milling Machine): 5-axis linkage control, high-strength casting, Weihong CNC system.
- Prosthenix SinterMax (Sintering Furnace): Programmable speed, 4 Si-Mo heating rods, 99 firing programs.
- Prosthenix DustVac (Milling Dust Collector): High vacuum efficiency for zirconia/ceramics. Quiet operation.
- Prosthenix PrintDent (3D Printer): 9.25" 6K screen, 34µm accuracy, prints 8 models in 5 minutes.
- Prosthenix ZircoDisc (Zirconia Disc): Multi-layer (UT-ML/ST-ML) blanks. 600-1100 MPa strength, 49-53% transparency.

5. ImplorX™ & Mordent™ (Implant Systems):
- ImplorX ImplaPower (Implant Motor): Brushless, 200,000 rpm, ultra-quiet (40 dB), multifunctional foot pedal.
- ImplorX ImplaDrive (Implant Handpiece): 20:1 gear ratio, German ball bearings, 80 Ncm torque.
- ImplorX OsteoSaw (Saw Handpiece): R (up-down), S (back-forth), O (left-right) motion for bone cutting.
- Mordent Implant System: Tapered RBM-treated titanium implants (Grade 23). Internal hex connection, micro-threads for crestal bone preservation.
- Mordent Abutment: Anatomic and Screw-retained options. Titanium Grade 23, gamma irradiated.

6. Sterixis™ (Infection Control):
- Sterixis AutoSter (Table Top Autoclave): 23L capacity, color touch screen, dual-fan condenser, 99% saturated steam.
- Sterixis H2OPure (Water Distiller): SS304 chamber, 4L capacity, 160°C automatic cut-off.
- Sterixis SealSafe (Sealing Machine): 12mm wide sealing seam, smart bag length selection, energy efficient (100W).
- Sterixis SonoClean (Ultrasonic Cleaner): 2.5L tank, 40 kHz frequency, adjustable temp (20-80°C).

7. Alignia™ (Orthodontics):
- Alignia ArchRect/ArchRound: Stainless steel archwires with high elastic modulus (180 GPa).
- Alignia BraceFit (Brackets): Mini MBT standard brackets, monoblock construction, retentive base.
- Alignia SelfBrace (Self-Ligating Bracket): Patented sliding cover, 80 gauge mesh base, 17-4 stainless steel.
- Alignia ThermoForm (Thermoforming Machine): Carbon fiber heating element, overheat protection, 7.4 kg unit.

8. PerioLite™ (Soft-tissue Care):
- PerioLite UltraScale (Ultrasonic Scaler): 28 kHz activation, Scaling/Perio/Endo modes, autoclavable LED handpiece.
- Mesic (Dental Diode Laser): 980nm GaAlAs laser, up to 10W power, minimally invasive cutting and coagulation.

9. SmileAura™ (Preventive Solutions):
- SmileAura AlumiX Pro (Alumina Air Polisher): Tungsten steel nozzle, 2-in-1 design for alumina and sodium bicarbonate.
- SmileAura OralJet (Oral Irrigator): 1800mAh battery, 335ml tank, 4 working modes, USB-C charging.
- SmileAura WhitenX (LED Teeth Whitening): 40W power, multi-wavelength (Blue/Red/Purple), 5" touch screen.
- SmileAura AirPolish: Air/water/powder stream for biofilm removal. 360° rotation.

10. DentAxis™ (Equipment & Consumables):
- DentAxis ChairOne (Dental Chair): Hydraulic movement, ergonomic upholstery, rotatable ceramic spittoon, LED operating light.
- DentAxis Turbo45/TurboMax3: 45-degree and standard high-speed air turbines. German bearings, triple/quadruple water spray.
- DentAxis ContraX (Contra Angle Handpiece): Fiber-optic with LED, 25,000 rpm, push-button chuck.
- DentAxis Anaeject (Anesthesia Booster): Al-controlled digital dosage, PDL pressure feedback, soothing music feature.
- DentAxis LiteCure (LED Curing Light): Wide-spectrum (385-780nm), up to 3000 mW/cm² intensity.

Manufacturer:
Meril Life Sciences / ODENT
Vapi - 396 191, Gujarat, India.
"New Era of Dental Solutions"

3. Endovate™ (Endodontic Precision):
- Endovate FusionOne (Integrated Endo System): Motor + Apex Locator + GP Cutter + GP Filler + Ultrasonic Activator. 7" touch screen.
- Endovate MicroView (Surgical Microscope): Stepless zoom, high brightness LED, multi-color filters, variable zoom (200-450mm).
- Endovate Motix Pro (Endo Motor): Inbuilt apex locator, brushless motor, 360° mini contra angle, 9 programmable settings.
- Endovate ThermaFill (GP Obturation Filler): Bluetooth app connectivity, precise electric injection of gutta-percha.
- Endovate ObtuCut (GP Obturation Cutter): 360° ring switch, rapid heat-up, pre-bendable tips.

4. Prosthenix™ (Prosthetic Excellence / CAD-CAM):
- Prosthenix MillPro (Hybrid Milling Machine): 5-axis linkage control, high-strength casting, Weihong CNC system.
- Prosthenix SinterMax (Sintering Furnace): Programmable speed, 4 Si-Mo heating rods, 99 firing programs.
- Prosthenix DustVac (Milling Dust Collector): High vacuum efficiency for zirconia/ceramics. Quiet operation.
- Prosthenix PrintDent (3D Printer): 9.25" 6K screen, 34µm accuracy, prints 8 models in 5 minutes.
- Prosthenix ZircoDisc (Zirconia Disc): Multi-layer (UT-ML/ST-ML) blanks. 600-1100 MPa strength, 49-53% transparency.

5. ImplorX™ & Mordent™ (Implant Systems):
- ImplorX ImplaPower (Implant Motor): Brushless, 200,000 rpm, ultra-quiet (40 dB), multifunctional foot pedal.
- ImplorX ImplaDrive (Implant Handpiece): 20:1 gear ratio, German ball bearings, 80 Ncm torque.
- ImplorX OsteoSaw (Saw Handpiece): R (up-down), S (back-forth), O (left-right) motion for bone cutting.
- Mordent Implant System: Tapered RBM-treated titanium implants (Grade 23). Internal hex connection, micro-threads for crestal bone preservation.
- Mordent Abutment: Anatomic and Screw-retained options. Titanium Grade 23, gamma irradiated.

6. Sterixis™ (Infection Control):
- Sterixis AutoSter (Table Top Autoclave): 23L capacity, color touch screen, dual-fan condenser, 99% saturated steam.
- Sterixis H2OPure (Water Distiller): SS304 chamber, 4L capacity, 160°C automatic cut-off.
- Sterixis SealSafe (Sealing Machine): 12mm wide sealing seam, smart bag length selection, energy efficient (100W).
- Sterixis SonoClean (Ultrasonic Cleaner): 2.5L tank, 40 kHz frequency, adjustable temp (20-80°C).

7. Alignia™ (Orthodontics):
- Alignia ArchRect/ArchRound: Stainless steel archwires with high elastic modulus (180 GPa).
- Alignia BraceFit (Brackets): Mini MBT standard brackets, monoblock construction, retentive base.
- Alignia SelfBrace (Self-Ligating Bracket): Patented sliding cover, 80 gauge mesh base, 17-4 stainless steel.
- Alignia ThermoForm (Thermoforming Machine): Carbon fiber heating element, overheat protection, 7.4 kg unit.

8. PerioLite™ (Soft-tissue Care):
- PerioLite UltraScale (Ultrasonic Scaler): 28 kHz activation, Scaling/Perio/Endo modes, autoclavable LED handpiece.
- Mesic (Dental Diode Laser): 980nm GaAlAs laser, up to 10W power, minimally invasive cutting and coagulation.

9. SmileAura™ (Preventive Solutions):
- SmileAura AlumiX Pro (Alumina Air Polisher): Tungsten steel nozzle, 2-in-1 design for alumina and sodium bicarbonate.
- SmileAura OralJet (Oral Irrigator): 1800mAh battery, 335ml tank, 4 working modes, USB-C charging.
- SmileAura WhitenX (LED Teeth Whitening): 40W power, multi-wavelength (Blue/Red/Purple), 5" touch screen.
- SmileAura AirPolish: Air/water/powder stream for biofilm removal. 360° rotation.

10. DentAxis™ (Equipment & Consumables):
- DentAxis ChairOne (Dental Chair): Hydraulic movement, ergonomic upholstery, rotatable ceramic spittoon, LED operating light.
- DentAxis Turbo45/TurboMax3: 45-degree and standard high-speed air turbines. German bearings, triple/quadruple water spray.
- DentAxis ContraX (Contra Angle Handpiece): Fiber-optic with LED, 25,000 rpm, push-button chuck.
- DentAxis Anaeject (Anesthesia Booster): Al-controlled digital dosage, PDL pressure feedback, soothing music feature.
- DentAxis LiteCure (LED Curing Light): Wide-spectrum (385-780nm), up to 3000 mW/cm² intensity.

- Vizora 3DView (CBCT): State-of-the-art extra-oral imaging. Features largest FOV (23x18), IGZO sensor technology, TDI Ceph scan, up to 300 fps.

- Vizora FaceMap (Dental Face 3D Scanner): 3D facial analysis and AI-driven smile design. Structured light photogrammetry, 0.5mm accuracy.

- Vizora RayGun (X-Ray Gun): Portable intraoral diagnostic device, high-resolution, long-lasting battery, 3.0" display.

2. Optra™ (Restorative Workflows):
- OptraDent RootPutty (Root Canal Putty): Bioactive bioceramic putty for repair and obturation. Washout resistant, pH > 12.5, 2-hour set time.
- OptraDent ResiKit (Dental Resin Kit): Direct restorative resin (Bis-GMA/TEGDMA) for anterior/posterior. High abrasion resistance, low shrinkage.
- OptraDent EtchPrime (Etchant Gel): 37% Phosphoric acid gel for enamel/dentin conditioning.
- OptraDent SealGuard (Pit & Fissure Sealant): Protective barrier for occlusal surfaces. Radiopaque, long-term durability.
- OptraDent BioSeal (Root Canal Bioceramic Sealer): Resin-free bioactive sealer for permanent obturation. High flowability, pH > 12.5.

3. Endovate™ (Endodontic Precision):
- Endovate FusionOne (Integrated Endo System): Motor + Apex Locator + GP Cutter + GP Filler + Ultrasonic Activator. 7" touch screen.
- Endovate MicroView (Surgical Microscope): Stepless zoom, high brightness LED, multi-color filters, variable zoom (200-450mm).
- Endovate Motix Pro (Endo Motor): Inbuilt apex locator, brushless motor, 360° mini contra angle, 9 programmable settings.
- Endovate ThermaFill (GP Obturation Filler): Bluetooth app connectivity, precise electric injection of gutta-percha.
- Endovate ObtuCut (GP Obturation Cutter): 360° ring switch, rapid heat-up, pre-bendable tips.

4. Prosthenix™ (Prosthetic Excellence / CAD-CAM):
- Prosthenix MillPro (Hybrid Milling Machine): 5-axis linkage control, high-strength casting, Weihong CNC system.
- Prosthenix SinterMax (Sintering Furnace): Programmable speed, 4 Si-Mo heating rods, 99 firing programs.
- Prosthenix DustVac (Milling Dust Collector): High vacuum efficiency for zirconia/ceramics. Quiet operation.
- Prosthenix PrintDent (3D Printer): 9.25" 6K screen, 34µm accuracy, prints 8 models in 5 minutes.
- Prosthenix ZircoDisc (Zirconia Disc): Multi-layer (UT-ML/ST-ML) blanks. 600-1100 MPa strength, 49-53% transparency.

5. ImplorX™ & Mordent™ (Implant Systems):
- ImplorX ImplaPower (Implant Motor): Brushless, 200,000 rpm, ultra-quiet (40 dB), multifunctional foot pedal.
- ImplorX ImplaDrive (Implant Handpiece): 20:1 gear ratio, German ball bearings, 80 Ncm torque.
- ImplorX OsteoSaw (Saw Handpiece): R (up-down), S (back-forth), O (left-right) motion for bone cutting.
- Mordent Implant System: Tapered RBM-treated titanium implants (Grade 23). Internal hex connection, micro-threads for crestal bone preservation.
- Mordent Abutment: Anatomic and Screw-retained options. Titanium Grade 23, gamma irradiated.

1. Vizora™ (Diagnostic Imaging):
- Vizora 3DView (CBCT): State-of-the-art extra-oral imaging. Features largest FOV (23x18), IGZO sensor technology, TDI Ceph scan, up to 300 fps.
- Vizora ScanPro (Intraoral Scanner): Compact handheld 3D digital impressions. Fast arch scan (30s), 10µm accuracy, anti-fogging, wireless.
- Vizora FaceMap (Dental Face 3D Scanner): 3D facial analysis and AI-driven smile design. Structured light photogrammetry, 0.5mm accuracy.
- Vizora X-RaySense (RVG Sensor): APS CMOS technology, 2.34M pixels, IP68 dustproof/waterproof.
- Vizora RayGun (X-Ray Gun): Portable intraoral diagnostic device, high-resolution, long-lasting battery, 3.0" display.

2. Optra™ (Restorative Workflows):
- OptraDent RootPutty (Root Canal Putty): Bioactive bioceramic putty for repair and obturation. Washout resistant, pH > 12.5, 2-hour set time.
- OptraDent ResiKit (Dental Resin Kit): Direct restorative resin (Bis-GMA/TEGDMA) for anterior/posterior. High abrasion resistance, low shrinkage.
- OptraDent EtchPrime (Etchant Gel): 37% Phosphoric acid gel for enamel/dentin conditioning.
- OptraDent SealGuard (Pit & Fissure Sealant): Protective barrier for occlusal surfaces. Radiopaque, long-term durability.
- OptraDent BioSeal (Root Canal Bioceramic Sealer): Resin-free bioactive sealer for permanent obturation. High flowability, pH > 12.5.

3. Endovate™ (Endodontic Precision):
- Endovate FusionOne (Integrated Endo System): Motor + Apex Locator + GP Cutter + GP Filler + Ultrasonic Activator. 7" touch screen.
- Endovate MicroView (Surgical Microscope): Stepless zoom, high brightness LED, multi-color filters, variable zoom (200-450mm).
- Endovate Motix Pro (Endo Motor): Inbuilt apex locator, brushless motor, 360° mini contra angle, 9 programmable settings.
- Endovate ThermaFill (GP Obturation Filler): Bluetooth app connectivity, precise electric injection of gutta-percha.
- Endovate ObtuCut (GP Obturation Cutter): 360° ring switch, rapid heat-up, pre-bendable tips.

4. Prosthenix™ (Prosthetic Excellence / CAD-CAM):
- Prosthenix MillPro (Hybrid Milling Machine): 5-axis linkage control, high-strength casting, Weihong CNC system.
- Prosthenix SinterMax (Sintering Furnace): Programmable speed, 4 Si-Mo heating rods, 99 firing programs.
- Prosthenix DustVac (Milling Dust Collector): High vacuum efficiency for zirconia/ceramics. Quiet operation.
- Prosthenix PrintDent (3D Printer): 9.25" 6K screen, 34µm accuracy, prints 8 models in 5 minutes.
- Prosthenix ZircoDisc (Zirconia Disc): Multi-layer (UT-ML/ST-ML) blanks. 600-1100 MPa strength, 49-53% transparency.

5. ImplorX™ & Mordent™ (Implant Systems):
- ImplorX ImplaPower (Implant Motor): Brushless, 200,000 rpm, ultra-quiet (40 dB), multifunctional foot pedal.
- ImplorX ImplaDrive (Implant Handpiece): 20:1 gear ratio, German ball bearings, 80 Ncm torque.
- ImplorX OsteoSaw (Saw Handpiece): R (up-down), S (back-forth), O (left-right) motion for bone cutting.
- Mordent Implant System: Tapered RBM-treated titanium implants (Grade 23). Internal hex connection, micro-threads for crestal bone preservation.
- Mordent Abutment: Anatomic and Screw-retained options. Titanium Grade 23, gamma irradiated.

6. Sterixis™ (Infection Control):
- Sterixis AutoSter (Table Top Autoclave): 23L capacity, color touch screen, dual-fan condenser, 99% saturated steam.
- Sterixis H2OPure (Water Distiller): SS304 chamber, 4L capacity, 160°C automatic cut-off.
- Sterixis SealSafe (Sealing Machine): 12mm wide sealing seam, smart bag length selection, energy efficient (100W).
- Sterixis SonoClean (Ultrasonic Cleaner): 2.5L tank, 40 kHz frequency, adjustable temp (20-80°C).

7. Alignia™ (Orthodontics):
- Alignia ArchRect/ArchRound: Stainless steel archwires with high elastic modulus (180 GPa).
- Alignia BraceFit (Brackets): Mini MBT standard brackets, monoblock construction, retentive base.
- Alignia SelfBrace (Self-Ligating Bracket): Patented sliding cover, 80 gauge mesh base, 17-4 stainless steel.
- Alignia ThermoForm (Thermoforming Machine): Carbon fiber heating element, overheat protection, 7.4 kg unit.

8. PerioLite™ (Soft-tissue Care):
- PerioLite UltraScale (Ultrasonic Scaler): 28 kHz activation, Scaling/Perio/Endo modes, autoclavable LED handpiece.
- Mesic (Dental Diode Laser): 980nm GaAlAs laser, up to 10W power, minimally invasive cutting and coagulation.

- SmileAura AirPolish: Air/water/powder stream for biofilm removal. 360° rotation.

full_raw_transcription:
ODENT™ - NEW ERA OF DENTAL SOLUTIONS
Meril Dental Portfolio Reconstruction

1. Vizora™ (Diagnostic Imaging):
- Vizora 3DView (CBCT): State-of-the-art extra-oral imaging. Features largest FOV (23x18), IGZO sensor technology, TDI Ceph scan, up to 300 fps.
- Vizora ScanPro (Intraoral Scanner): Compact handheld 3D digital impressions. Fast arch scan (30s), 10µm accuracy, anti-fogging, wireless.
- Vizora FaceMap (Dental Face 3D Scanner): 3D facial analysis and AI-driven smile design. Structured light photogrammetry, 0.5mm accuracy.
- Vizora X-RaySense (RVG Sensor): APS CMOS technology, 2.34M pixels, IP68 dustproof/waterproof.
- Vizora RayGun (X-Ray Gun): Portable intraoral diagnostic device, high-resolution, long-lasting battery, 3.0" display.

2. Optra™ (Restorative Workflows):
- OptraDent RootPutty (Root Canal Putty): Bioactive bioceramic putty for repair and obturation. Washout resistant, pH > 12.5, 2-hour set time.
- OptraDent ResiKit (Dental Resin Kit): Direct restorative resin (Bis-GMA/TEGDMA) for anterior/posterior. High abrasion resistance, low shrinkage.
- OptraDent EtchPrime (Etchant Gel): 37% Phosphoric acid gel for enamel/dentin conditioning.
- OptraDent SealGuard (Pit & Fissure Sealant): Protective barrier for occlusal surfaces. Radiopaque, long-term durability.
- OptraDent BioSeal (Root Canal Bioceramic Sealer): Resin-free bioactive sealer for permanent obturation. High flowability, pH > 12.5.

3. Endovate™ (Endodontic Precision):
- Endovate FusionOne (Integrated Endo System): Motor + Apex Locator + GP Cutter + GP Filler + Ultrasonic Activator. 7" touch screen.
- Endovate MicroView (Surgical Microscope): Stepless zoom, high brightness LED, multi-color filters, variable zoom (200-450mm).
- Endovate Motix Pro (Endo Motor): Inbuilt apex locator, brushless motor, 360° mini contra angle, 9 programmable settings.
- Endovate ThermaFill (GP Obturation Filler): Bluetooth app connectivity, precise electric injection of gutta-percha.
- Endovate ObtuCut (GP Obturation Cutter): 360° ring switch, rapid heat-up, pre-bendable tips.

4. Prosthenix™ (Prosthetic Excellence / CAD-CAM):
- Prosthenix MillPro (Hybrid Milling Machine): 5-axis linkage control, high-strength casting, Weihong CNC system.
- Prosthenix SinterMax (Sintering Furnace): Programmable speed, 4 Si-Mo heating rods, 99 firing programs.
- Prosthenix DustVac (Milling Dust Collector): High vacuum efficiency for zirconia/ceramics. Quiet operation.
- Prosthenix PrintDent (3D Printer): 9.25" 6K screen, 34µm accuracy, prints 8 models in 5 minutes.
- Prosthenix ZircoDisc (Zirconia Disc): Multi-layer (UT-ML/ST-ML) blanks. 600-1100 MPa strength, 49-53% transparency.

5. ImplorX™ & Mordent™ (Implant Systems):
- ImplorX ImplaPower (Implant Motor): Brushless, 200,000 rpm, ultra-quiet (40 dB), multifunctional foot pedal.
- ImplorX ImplaDrive (Implant Handpiece): 20:1 gear ratio, German ball bearings, 80 Ncm torque.
- ImplorX OsteoSaw (Saw Handpiece): R (up-down), S (back-forth), O (left-right) motion for bone cutting.
- Mordent Implant System: Tapered RBM-treated titanium implants (Grade 23). Internal hex connection, micro-threads for crestal bone preservation.
- Mordent Abutment: Anatomic and Screw-retained options. Titanium Grade 23, gamma irradiated.

6. Sterixis™ (Infection Control):
- Sterixis AutoSter (Table Top Autoclave): 23L capacity, color touch screen, dual-fan condenser, 99% saturated steam.
- Sterixis H2OPure (Water Distiller): SS304 chamber, 4L capacity, 160°C automatic cut-off.
- Sterixis SealSafe (Sealing Machine): 12mm wide sealing seam, smart bag length selection, energy efficient (100W).
- Sterixis SonoClean (Ultrasonic Cleaner): 2.5L tank, 40 kHz frequency, adjustable temp (20-80°C).

7. Alignia™ (Orthodontics):
- Alignia ArchRect/ArchRound: Stainless steel archwires with high elastic modulus (180 GPa).
- Alignia BraceFit (Brackets): Mini MBT standard brackets, monoblock construction, retentive base.
- Alignia SelfBrace (Self-Ligating Bracket): Patented sliding cover, 80 gauge mesh base, 17-4 stainless steel.
- Alignia ThermoForm (Thermoforming Machine): Carbon fiber heating element, overheat protection, 7.4 kg unit.

8. PerioLite™ (Soft-tissue Care):
- PerioLite UltraScale (Ultrasonic Scaler): 28 kHz activation, Scaling/Perio/Endo modes, autoclavable LED handpiece.
- Mesic (Dental Diode Laser): 980nm GaAlAs laser, up to 10W power, minimally invasive cutting and coagulation.

9. SmileAura™ (Preventive Solutions):
- SmileAura AlumiX Pro (Alumina Air Polisher): Tungsten steel nozzle, 2-in-1 design for alumina and sodium bicarbonate.
- SmileAura OralJet (Oral Irrigator): 1800mAh battery, 335ml tank, 4 working modes, USB-C charging.
- SmileAura WhitenX (LED Teeth Whitening): 40W power, multi-wavelength (Blue/Red/Purple), 5" touch screen.
- SmileAura AirPolish: Air/water/powder stream for biofilm removal. 360° rotation.

10. DentAxis™ (Equipment & Consumables):
- DentAxis ChairOne (Dental Chair): Hydraulic movement, ergonomic upholstery, rotatable ceramic spittoon, LED operating light.
- DentAxis Turbo45/TurboMax3: 45-degree and standard high-speed air turbines. German bearings, triple/quadruple water spray.
- DentAxis ContraX (Contra Angle Handpiece): Fiber-optic with LED, 25,000 rpm, push-button chuck.
- DentAxis Anaeject (Anesthesia Booster): Al-controlled digital dosage, PDL pressure feedback, soothing music feature.
- DentAxis LiteCure (LED Curing Light): Wide-spectrum (385-780nm), up to 3000 mW/cm² intensity.

Manufacturer:
Meril Life Sciences / ODENT
Vapi - 396 191, Gujarat, India.
"New Era of Dental Solutions"

- OptraDent ResiKit (Dental Resin Kit): Direct restorative resin (Bis-GMA/TEGDMA) for anterior/posterior. High abrasion resistance, low shrinkage.
- OptraDent EtchPrime (Etchant Gel): 37% Phosphoric acid gel for enamel/dentin conditioning.
- OptraDent SealGuard (Pit & Fissure Sealant): Protective barrier for occlusal surfaces. Radiopaque, long-term durability.
- OptraDent BioSeal (Root Canal Bioceramic Sealer): Resin-free bioactive sealer for permanent obturation. High flowability, pH > 12.5.

3. Endovate™ (Endodontic Precision):
- Endovate FusionOne (Integrated Endo System): Motor + Apex Locator + GP Cutter + GP Filler + Ultrasonic Activator. 7" touch screen.
- Endovate MicroView (Surgical Microscope): Stepless zoom, high brightness LED, multi-color filters, variable zoom (200-450mm).
- Endovate Motix Pro (Endo Motor): Inbuilt apex locator, brushless motor, 360° mini contra angle, 9 programmable settings.
- Endovate ThermaFill (GP Obturation Filler): Bluetooth app connectivity, precise electric injection of gutta-percha.
- Endovate ObtuCut (GP Obturation Cutter): 360° ring switch, rapid heat-up, pre-bendable tips.

4. Prosthenix™ (Prosthetic Excellence / CAD-CAM):
- Prosthenix MillPro (Hybrid Milling Machine): 5-axis linkage control, high-strength casting, Weihong CNC system.
- Prosthenix SinterMax (Sintering Furnace): Programmable speed, 4 Si-Mo heating rods, 99 firing programs.
- Prosthenix DustVac (Milling Dust Collector): High vacuum efficiency for zirconia/ceramics. Quiet operation.
- Prosthenix PrintDent (3D Printer): 9.25" 6K screen, 34µm accuracy, prints 8 models in 5 minutes.
- Prosthenix ZircoDisc (Zirconia Disc): Multi-layer (UT-ML/ST-ML) blanks. 600-1100 MPa strength, 49-53% transparency.

5. ImplorX™ & Mordent™ (Implant Systems):
- ImplorX ImplaPower (Implant Motor): Brushless, 200,000 rpm, ultra-quiet (40 dB), multifunctional foot pedal.
- ImplorX ImplaDrive (Implant Handpiece): 20:1 gear ratio, German ball bearings, 80 Ncm torque.
- ImplorX OsteoSaw (Saw Handpiece): R (up-down), S (back-forth), O (left-right) motion for bone cutting.
- Mordent Implant System: Tapered RBM-treated titanium implants (Grade 23). Internal hex connection, micro-threads for crestal bone preservation.
- Mordent Abutment: Anatomic and Screw-retained options. Titanium Grade 23, gamma irradiated.

6. Sterixis™ (Infection Control):
- Sterixis AutoSter (Table Top Autoclave): 23L capacity, color touch screen, dual-fan condenser, 99% saturated steam.
- Sterixis H2OPure (Water Distiller): SS304 chamber, 4L capacity, 160°C automatic cut-off.
- Sterixis SealSafe (Sealing Machine): 12mm wide sealing seam, smart bag length selection, energy efficient (100W).
- Sterixis SonoClean (Ultrasonic Cleaner): 2.5L tank, 40 kHz frequency, adjustable temp (20-80°C).

7. Alignia™ (Orthodontics):
- Alignia ArchRect/ArchRound: Stainless steel archwires with high elastic modulus (180 GPa).
- Alignia BraceFit (Brackets): Mini MBT standard brackets, monoblock construction, retentive base.
- Alignia SelfBrace (Self-Ligating Bracket): Patented sliding cover, 80 gauge mesh base, 17-4 stainless steel.
- Alignia ThermoForm (Thermoforming Machine): Carbon fiber heating element, overheat protection, 7.4 kg unit.

8. PerioLite™ (Soft-tissue Care):
- PerioLite UltraScale (Ultrasonic Scaler): 28 kHz activation, Scaling/Perio/Endo modes, autoclavable LED handpiece.
- Mesic (Dental Diode Laser): 980nm GaAlAs laser, up to 10W power, minimally invasive cutting and coagulation.

9. SmileAura™ (Preventive Solutions):
- SmileAura AlumiX Pro (Alumina Air Polisher): Tungsten steel nozzle, 2-in-1 design for alumina and sodium bicarbonate.
- SmileAura OralJet (Oral Irrigator): 1800mAh battery, 335ml tank, 4 working modes, USB-C charging.
- SmileAura WhitenX (LED Teeth Whitening): 40W power, multi-wavelength (Blue/Red/Purple), 5" touch screen.
- SmileAura AirPolish: Air/water/powder stream for biofilm removal. 360° rotation.

10. DentAxis™ (Equipment & Consumables):
- DentAxis ChairOne (Dental Chair): Hydraulic movement, ergonomic upholstery, rotatable ceramic spittoon, LED operating light.
- DentAxis Turbo45/TurboMax3: 45-degree and standard high-speed air turbines. German bearings, triple/quadruple water spray.
- DentAxis ContraX (Contra Angle Handpiece): Fiber-optic with LED, 25,000 rpm, push-button chuck.
- DentAxis Anaeject (Anesthesia Booster): Al-controlled digital dosage, PDL pressure feedback, soothing music feature.
- DentAxis LiteCure (LED Curing Light): Wide-spectrum (385-780nm), up to 3000 mW/cm² intensity.

Manufacturer:
Meril Life Sciences / ODENT
Vapi - 396 191, Gujarat, India.
"New Era of Dental Solutions"

- OptraDent SealGuard (Pit & Fissure Sealant): Protective barrier for occlusal surfaces. Radiopaque, long-term durability.

3. Endovate™ (Endodontic Precision):
- Endovate FusionOne (Integrated Endo System): Motor + Apex Locator + GP Cutter + GP Filler + Ultrasonic Activator. 7" touch screen.

- Endovate Motix Pro (Endo Motor): Inbuilt apex locator, brushless motor, 360° mini contra angle, 9 programmable settings.
- Endovate ThermaFill (GP Obturation Filler): Bluetooth app connectivity, precise electric injection of gutta-percha.
- Endovate ObtuCut (GP Obturation Cutter): 360° ring switch, rapid heat-up, pre-bendable tips.

4. Prosthenix™ (Prosthetic Excellence / CAD-CAM):

- Prosthenix DustVac (Milling Dust Collector): High vacuum efficiency for zirconia/ceramics. Quiet operation.
- Prosthenix PrintDent (3D Printer): 9.25" 6K screen, 34µm accuracy, prints 8 models in 5 minutes.
- Prosthenix ZircoDisc (Zirconia Disc): Multi-layer (UT-ML/ST-ML) blanks. 600-1100 MPa strength, 49-53% transparency.

- ImplorX ImplaDrive (Implant Handpiece): 20:1 gear ratio, German ball bearings, 80 Ncm torque.
- ImplorX OsteoSaw (Saw Handpiece): R (up-down), S (back-forth), O (left-right) motion for bone cutting.
- Mordent Implant System: Tapered RBM-treated titanium implants (Grade 23). Internal hex connection, micro-threads for crestal bone preservation.
- Mordent Abutment: Anatomic and Screw-retained options. Titanium Grade 23, gamma irradiated.

1. Vizora™ (Diagnostic Imaging):
- Vizora 3DView (CBCT): State-of-the-art extra-oral imaging. Features largest FOV (23x18), IGZO sensor technology, TDI Ceph scan, up to 300 fps.
- Vizora ScanPro (Intraoral Scanner): Compact handheld 3D digital impressions. Fast arch scan (30s), 10µm accuracy, anti-fogging, wireless.
- Vizora FaceMap (Dental Face 3D Scanner): 3D facial analysis and AI-driven smile design. Structured light photogrammetry, 0.5mm accuracy.
- Vizora X-RaySense (RVG Sensor): APS CMOS technology, 2.34M pixels, IP68 dustproof/waterproof.
- Vizora RayGun (X-Ray Gun): Portable intraoral diagnostic device, high-resolution, long-lasting battery, 3.0" display.

2. Optra™ (Restorative Workflows):
- OptraDent RootPutty (Root Canal Putty): Bioactive bioceramic putty for repair and obturation. Washout resistant, pH > 12.5, 2-hour set time.
- OptraDent ResiKit (Dental Resin Kit): Direct restorative resin (Bis-GMA/TEGDMA) for anterior/posterior. High abrasion resistance, low shrinkage.
- OptraDent EtchPrime (Etchant Gel): 37% Phosphoric acid gel for enamel/dentin conditioning.
- OptraDent SealGuard (Pit & Fissure Sealant): Protective barrier for occlusal surfaces. Radiopaque, long-term durability.
- OptraDent BioSeal (Root Canal Bioceramic Sealer): Resin-free bioactive sealer for permanent obturation. High flowability, pH > 12.5.

3. Endovate™ (Endodontic Precision):
- Endovate FusionOne (Integrated Endo System): Motor + Apex Locator + GP Cutter + GP Filler + Ultrasonic Activator. 7" touch screen.
- Endovate MicroView (Surgical Microscope): Stepless zoom, high brightness LED, multi-color filters, variable zoom (200-450mm).
- Endovate Motix Pro (Endo Motor): Inbuilt apex locator, brushless motor, 360° mini contra angle, 9 programmable settings.
- Endovate ThermaFill (GP Obturation Filler): Bluetooth app connectivity, precise electric injection of gutta-percha.
- Endovate ObtuCut (GP Obturation Cutter): 360° ring switch, rapid heat-up, pre-bendable tips.

4. Prosthenix™ (Prosthetic Excellence / CAD-CAM):
- Prosthenix MillPro (Hybrid Milling Machine): 5-axis linkage control, high-strength casting, Weihong CNC system.
- Prosthenix SinterMax (Sintering Furnace): Programmable speed, 4 Si-Mo heating rods, 99 firing programs.
- Prosthenix DustVac (Milling Dust Collector): High vacuum efficiency for zirconia/ceramics. Quiet operation.
- Prosthenix PrintDent (3D Printer): 9.25" 6K screen, 34µm accuracy, prints 8 models in 5 minutes.
- Prosthenix ZircoDisc (Zirconia Disc): Multi-layer (UT-ML/ST-ML) blanks. 600-1100 MPa strength, 49-53% transparency.

5. ImplorX™ & Mordent™ (Implant Systems):
- ImplorX ImplaPower (Implant Motor): Brushless, 200,000 rpm, ultra-quiet (40 dB), multifunctional foot pedal.
- ImplorX ImplaDrive (Implant Handpiece): 20:1 gear ratio, German ball bearings, 80 Ncm torque.
- ImplorX OsteoSaw (Saw Handpiece): R (up-down), S (back-forth), O (left-right) motion for bone cutting.
- Mordent Implant System: Tapered RBM-treated titanium implants (Grade 23). Internal hex connection, micro-threads for crestal bone preservation.
- Mordent Abutment: Anatomic and Screw-retained options. Titanium Grade 23, gamma irradiated.

6. Sterixis™ (Infection Control):
- Sterixis AutoSter (Table Top Autoclave): 23L capacity, color touch screen, dual-fan condenser, 99% saturated steam.
- Sterixis H2OPure (Water Distiller): SS304 chamber, 4L capacity, 160°C automatic cut-off.
- Sterixis SealSafe (Sealing Machine): 12mm wide sealing seam, smart bag length selection, energy efficient (100W).
- Sterixis SonoClean (Ultrasonic Cleaner): 2.5L tank, 40 kHz frequency, adjustable temp (20-80°C).

7. Alignia™ (Orthodontics):
- Alignia ArchRect/ArchRound: Stainless steel archwires with high elastic modulus (180 GPa).
- Alignia BraceFit (Brackets): Mini MBT standard brackets, monoblock construction, retentive base.
- Alignia SelfBrace (Self-Ligating Bracket): Patented sliding cover, 80 gauge mesh base, 17-4 stainless steel.
- Alignia ThermoForm (Thermoforming Machine): Carbon fiber heating element, overheat protection, 7.4 kg unit.

8. PerioLite™ (Soft-tissue Care):
- PerioLite UltraScale (Ultrasonic Scaler): 28 kHz activation, Scaling/Perio/Endo modes, autoclavable LED handpiece.
- Mesic (Dental Diode Laser): 980nm GaAlAs laser, up to 10W power, minimally invasive cutting and coagulation.

9. SmileAura™ (Preventive Solutions):

product_name: DentAxis Turbo45 45-Degree Surgical High-speed Air Turbine
product_name_display: DentAxis Turbo45 45-Degree Surgical High-speed Air Turbine
full_raw_transcription:
ODENT™ - NEW ERA OF DENTAL SOLUTIONS
Meril Dental Portfolio Reconstruction

1. Vizora™ (Diagnostic Imaging):
- Vizora 3DView (CBCT): State-of-the-art extra-oral imaging. Features largest FOV (23x18), IGZO sensor technology, TDI Ceph scan, up to 300 fps.
- Vizora ScanPro (Intraoral Scanner): Compact handheld 3D digital impressions. Fast arch scan (30s), 10µm accuracy, anti-fogging, wireless.
- Vizora FaceMap (Dental Face 3D Scanner): 3D facial analysis and AI-driven smile design. Structured light photogrammetry, 0.5mm accuracy.
- Vizora X-RaySense (RVG Sensor): APS CMOS technology, 2.34M pixels, IP68 dustproof/waterproof.
- Vizora RayGun (X-Ray Gun): Portable intraoral diagnostic device, high-resolution, long-lasting battery, 3.0" display.

2. Optra™ (Restorative Workflows):
- OptraDent RootPutty (Root Canal Putty): Bioactive bioceramic putty for repair and obturation. Washout resistant, pH > 12.5, 2-hour set time.
- OptraDent ResiKit (Dental Resin Kit): Direct restorative resin (Bis-GMA/TEGDMA) for anterior/posterior. High abrasion resistance, low shrinkage.
- OptraDent EtchPrime (Etchant Gel): 37% Phosphoric acid gel for enamel/dentin conditioning.
- OptraDent SealGuard (Pit & Fissure Sealant): Protective barrier for occlusal surfaces. Radiopaque, long-term durability.
- OptraDent BioSeal (Root Canal Bioceramic Sealer): Resin-free bioactive sealer for permanent obturation. High flowability, pH > 12.5.

3. Endovate™ (Endodontic Precision):
- Endovate FusionOne (Integrated Endo System): Motor + Apex Locator + GP Cutter + GP Filler + Ultrasonic Activator. 7" touch screen.
- Endovate MicroView (Surgical Microscope): Stepless zoom, high brightness LED, multi-color filters, variable zoom (200-450mm).
- Endovate Motix Pro (Endo Motor): Inbuilt apex locator, brushless motor, 360° mini contra angle, 9 programmable settings.
- Endovate ThermaFill (GP Obturation Filler): Bluetooth app connectivity, precise electric injection of gutta-percha.
- Endovate ObtuCut (GP Obturation Cutter): 360° ring switch, rapid heat-up, pre-bendable tips.

4. Prosthenix™ (Prosthetic Excellence / CAD-CAM):
- Prosthenix MillPro (Hybrid Milling Machine): 5-axis linkage control, high-strength casting, Weihong CNC system.
- Prosthenix SinterMax (Sintering Furnace): Programmable speed, 4 Si-Mo heating rods, 99 firing programs.
- Prosthenix DustVac (Milling Dust Collector): High vacuum efficiency for zirconia/ceramics. Quiet operation.
- Prosthenix PrintDent (3D Printer): 9.25" 6K screen, 34µm accuracy, prints 8 models in 5 minutes.
- Prosthenix ZircoDisc (Zirconia Disc): Multi-layer (UT-ML/ST-ML) blanks. 600-1100 MPa strength, 49-53% transparency.

5. ImplorX™ & Mordent™ (Implant Systems):
- ImplorX ImplaPower (Implant Motor): Brushless, 200,000 rpm, ultra-quiet (40 dB), multifunctional foot pedal.
- ImplorX ImplaDrive (Implant Handpiece): 20:1 gear ratio, German ball bearings, 80 Ncm torque.
- ImplorX OsteoSaw (Saw Handpiece): R (up-down), S (back-forth), O (left-right) motion for bone cutting.
- Mordent Implant System: Tapered RBM-treated titanium implants (Grade 23). Internal hex connection, micro-threads for crestal bone preservation.
- Mordent Abutment: Anatomic and Screw-retained options. Titanium Grade 23, gamma irradiated.

6. Sterixis™ (Infection Control):
- Sterixis AutoSter (Table Top Autoclave): 23L capacity, color touch screen, dual-fan condenser, 99% saturated steam.
- Sterixis H2OPure (Water Distiller): SS304 chamber, 4L capacity, 160°C automatic cut-off.
- Sterixis SealSafe (Sealing Machine): 12mm wide sealing seam, smart bag length selection, energy efficient (100W).
- Sterixis SonoClean (Ultrasonic Cleaner): 2.5L tank, 40 kHz frequency, adjustable temp (20-80°C).

7. Alignia™ (Orthodontics):
- Alignia ArchRect/ArchRound: Stainless steel archwires with high elastic modulus (180 GPa).
- Alignia BraceFit (Brackets): Mini MBT standard brackets, monoblock construction, retentive base.
- Alignia SelfBrace (Self-Ligating Bracket): Patented sliding cover, 80 gauge mesh base, 17-4 stainless steel.
- Alignia ThermoForm (Thermoforming Machine): Carbon fiber heating element, overheat protection, 7.4 kg unit.

8. PerioLite™ (Soft-tissue Care):
- PerioLite UltraScale (Ultrasonic Scaler): 28 kHz activation, Scaling/Perio/Endo modes, autoclavable LED handpiece.
- Mesic (Dental Diode Laser): 980nm GaAlAs laser, up to 10W power, minimally invasive cutting and coagulation.

9. SmileAura™ (Preventive Solutions):
- SmileAura AlumiX Pro (Alumina Air Polisher): Tungsten steel nozzle, 2-in-1 design for alumina and sodium bicarbonate.
- SmileAura OralJet (Oral Irrigator): 1800mAh battery, 335ml tank, 4 working modes, USB-C charging.
- SmileAura WhitenX (LED Teeth Whitening): 40W power, multi-wavelength (Blue/Red/Purple), 5" touch screen.
- SmileAura AirPolish: Air/water/powder stream for biofilm removal. 360° rotation.

10. DentAxis™ (Equipment & Consumables):
- DentAxis ChairOne (Dental Chair): Hydraulic movement, ergonomic upholstery, rotatable ceramic spittoon, LED operating light.
- DentAxis Turbo45/TurboMax3: 45-degree and standard high-speed air turbines. German bearings, triple/quadruple water spray.
- DentAxis ContraX (Contra Angle Handpiece): Fiber-optic with LED, 25,000 rpm, push-button chuck.
- DentAxis Anaeject (Anesthesia Booster): Al-controlled digital dosage, PDL pressure feedback, soothing music feature.
- DentAxis LiteCure (LED Curing Light): Wide-spectrum (385-780nm), up to 3000 mW/cm² intensity.

Manufacturer:
Meril Life Sciences / ODENT
Vapi - 396 191, Gujarat, India.
"New Era of Dental Solutions"

- Vizora RayGun (X-Ray Gun): Portable intraoral diagnostic device, high-resolution, long-lasting battery, 3.0" display.

2. Optra™ (Restorative Workflows):
- OptraDent RootPutty (Root Canal Putty): Bioactive bioceramic putty for repair and obturation. Washout resistant, pH > 12.5, 2-hour set time.
- OptraDent ResiKit (Dental Resin Kit): Direct restorative resin (Bis-GMA/TEGDMA) for anterior/posterior. High abrasion resistance, low shrinkage.
- OptraDent EtchPrime (Etchant Gel): 37% Phosphoric acid gel for enamel/dentin conditioning.
- OptraDent SealGuard (Pit & Fissure Sealant): Protective barrier for occlusal surfaces. Radiopaque, long-term durability.
- OptraDent BioSeal (Root Canal Bioceramic Sealer): Resin-free bioactive sealer for permanent obturation. High flowability, pH > 12.5.

3. Endovate™ (Endodontic Precision):
- Endovate FusionOne (Integrated Endo System): Motor + Apex Locator + GP Cutter + GP Filler + Ultrasonic Activator. 7" touch screen.
- Endovate MicroView (Surgical Microscope): Stepless zoom, high brightness LED, multi-color filters, variable zoom (200-450mm).
- Endovate Motix Pro (Endo Motor): Inbuilt apex locator, brushless motor, 360° mini contra angle, 9 programmable settings.
- Endovate ThermaFill (GP Obturation Filler): Bluetooth app connectivity, precise electric injection of gutta-percha.
- Endovate ObtuCut (GP Obturation Cutter): 360° ring switch, rapid heat-up, pre-bendable tips.

4. Prosthenix™ (Prosthetic Excellence / CAD-CAM):
- Prosthenix MillPro (Hybrid Milling Machine): 5-axis linkage control, high-strength casting, Weihong CNC system.
- Prosthenix SinterMax (Sintering Furnace): Programmable speed, 4 Si-Mo heating rods, 99 firing programs.
- Prosthenix DustVac (Milling Dust Collector): High vacuum efficiency for zirconia/ceramics. Quiet operation.
- Prosthenix PrintDent (3D Printer): 9.25" 6K screen, 34µm accuracy, prints 8 models in 5 minutes.
- Prosthenix ZircoDisc (Zirconia Disc): Multi-layer (UT-ML/ST-ML) blanks. 600-1100 MPa strength, 49-53% transparency.

5. ImplorX™ & Mordent™ (Implant Systems):
- ImplorX ImplaPower (Implant Motor): Brushless, 200,000 rpm, ultra-quiet (40 dB), multifunctional foot pedal.
- ImplorX ImplaDrive (Implant Handpiece): 20:1 gear ratio, German ball bearings, 80 Ncm torque.
- ImplorX OsteoSaw (Saw Handpiece): R (up-down), S (back-forth), O (left-right) motion for bone cutting.
- Mordent Implant System: Tapered RBM-treated titanium implants (Grade 23). Internal hex connection, micro-threads for crestal bone preservation.
- Mordent Abutment: Anatomic and Screw-retained options. Titanium Grade 23, gamma irradiated.

6. Sterixis™ (Infection Control):
- Sterixis AutoSter (Table Top Autoclave): 23L capacity, color touch screen, dual-fan condenser, 99% saturated steam.
- Sterixis H2OPure (Water Distiller): SS304 chamber, 4L capacity, 160°C automatic cut-off.
- Sterixis SealSafe (Sealing Machine): 12mm wide sealing seam, smart bag length selection, energy efficient (100W).
- Sterixis SonoClean (Ultrasonic Cleaner): 2.5L tank, 40 kHz frequency, adjustable temp (20-80°C).

7. Alignia™ (Orthodontics):
- Alignia ArchRect/ArchRound: Stainless steel archwires with high elastic modulus (180 GPa).
- Alignia BraceFit (Brackets): Mini MBT standard brackets, monoblock construction, retentive base.
- Alignia SelfBrace (Self-Ligating Bracket): Patented sliding cover, 80 gauge mesh base, 17-4 stainless steel.
- Alignia ThermoForm (Thermoforming Machine): Carbon fiber heating element, overheat protection, 7.4 kg unit.

8. PerioLite™ (Soft-tissue Care):
- PerioLite UltraScale (Ultrasonic Scaler): 28 kHz activation, Scaling/Perio/Endo modes, autoclavable LED handpiece.
- Mesic (Dental Diode Laser): 980nm GaAlAs laser, up to 10W power, minimally invasive cutting and coagulation.

9. SmileAura™ (Preventive Solutions):
- SmileAura AlumiX Pro (Alumina Air Polisher): Tungsten steel nozzle, 2-in-1 design for alumina and sodium bicarbonate.
- SmileAura OralJet (Oral Irrigator): 1800mAh battery, 335ml tank, 4 working modes, USB-C charging.
- SmileAura WhitenX (LED Teeth Whitening): 40W power, multi-wavelength (Blue/Red/Purple), 5" touch screen.
- SmileAura AirPolish: Air/water/powder stream for biofilm removal. 360° rotation.

10. DentAxis™ (Equipment & Consumables):
- DentAxis ChairOne (Dental Chair): Hydraulic movement, ergonomic upholstery, rotatable ceramic spittoon, LED operating light.
- DentAxis Turbo45/TurboMax3: 45-degree and standard high-speed air turbines. German bearings, triple/quadruple water spray.
- DentAxis ContraX (Contra Angle Handpiece): Fiber-optic with LED, 25,000 rpm, push-button chuck.
- DentAxis Anaeject (Anesthesia Booster): Al-controlled digital dosage, PDL pressure feedback, soothing music feature.
- DentAxis LiteCure (LED Curing Light): Wide-spectrum (385-780nm), up to 3000 mW/cm² intensity.

Manufacturer:
Meril Life Sciences / ODENT
Vapi - 396 191, Gujarat, India.
"New Era of Dental Solutions"

full_raw_transcription:
MERIL UROLOGY SOLUTIONS - THE GATEWAY TO TREATMENT
Full Portfolio Reconstruction

1. Consumables (Catheters, Baskets, Sheaths):
- Deflure™ Ureteral Balloon Dilatation Catheter: Pebax material for flexibility, dual markers for precise positioning, rapid inflation/deflation. Use: Stricture dilatation.
- SupraSure™ Suprapubic Cystostomy Catheter: Silicone material, chrysanthemum tip design (Malecot) to prevent slip, handle for easy grip. Use: Bladder drainage.
- Rescath™ General-Purpose Ureteral Catheter: Soft PVC, tapered tip to reduce trauma. Size: 3FR to 7FR.
- Ri-Catch™ / Ri-Catch+™ (Flexible/Rigid): Nitinol 4-wire tipless baskets with shape memory. Tipless design reduces trauma.
- Messtone™ Urological Retrieval Coil: Extraction of stone pieces, laser-resistant coil (3FR).
- Provure™ / Provure+ / Provure Pro™ (Access Sheaths): Hydrophilic coating, kink-resistant, bendable tip (Pro), Y-connector for suction (+).
- Glizer™ Amplatz Sheath: PTFE material, kink-resistant, tapered distal end (12FR to 30FR).

2. Stents & Guidewires:
- UretrixPro™ / Uretrix™ / Uretrix™+ (Hydrophilic): Polyurethane stents, temperature-softened, tapered tip, large lumens for drainage. 4.8FR to 6FR.
- RiMosten™ Mono Stent: Kink-resistant PU, pigtail tip, for drainage and irrigation.
- Zebcor™ Zebra Guidewire: White/blue striped for visualization, Nitinol core, tapered tip (0.028" to 0.038").
- Ribrid™ Hybrid Guidewire: Hydrophilic and PTFE coating combo for effortless navigation.
- Xcursion Hydrotip™: Blue/white striped, PU distal tip (fluoroscopic visible), PTFE jacket.
- Hydroease™ (Hydrophilic): Ultra-low friction in wet conditions, memory retention.
- Meriskate™ (PTFE): Flexible tip for atraumatic advancement, high torquability.

3. Dilators:
- Dilato™ Fascial Dilator Set: Smooth surface for atraumatic entry (8FR to 18FR).
- Dilatrix™ Urethral Dilator: Adapts to anatomical curves, biocompatible material.
- EasyDi™ Ureteral Dilator: Tapered end, outstanding resilience (6FR to 16FR).

4. Digital Imaging & Laser:
- ri-Uniview™ Digital Flexible Ureteroscope: 6.3Fr, 7.5Fr, 8.5Fr options. CMOS sensor, 275° up/down deflection, 140° FOV.
- riUroSnap™ Image Processor: 1920x1080 FHD, 1/2.8" CMOS, USB/SD recording, 100W LED lamp.
- MeriFRAG™+ Holmium Laser Portable System: 40W Ho:YAG laser (2100nm). Modes: Fragmentation, Popcorn, Dusting. Reusable fibers.

5. Special Category:
- ProNeph™ PCNL Package: Comprehensive set including puncture needle, fascial dilators, guidewire, peel-away sheath, and nephrostomy tube.

Manufacturer:
Meril Medical Innovations Pvt. Ltd.
Vapi - 396 191, Gujarat, India.
"Treat Smarter, Heal Faster"

full_raw_transcription:
MERIL SPORTS ENGINE - UNLEASH THE POTENTIAL
Sports Medicine & Arthroscopy Portfolio Reconstruction

1. Shoulder Arthroscopy (Ligament Anchors):
- INSTAREP-TI™ Titanium Anchor: Ti-6Al-4V (Grade 5 ELI). Self-drilling/screw-in. 2mm/3mm. Preloaded with UHMWPE suture.
- ROTAFIX-TI™ Headless Titanium Anchor: 4.5mm to 6.5mm. Advanced thread for cancellous/osteoporotic bone. Independent fiber channels.
- INSTAREP-BIO™ / ROTAFIX-BIO™: Bio-composite (PLGA + Beta-TCP). Gradual resorption and bone remodeling. Dual threads.
- INSTAREP-PEEK™ / ROTAFIX-PEEK™: Biostable non-absorbable PEEK. Low friction, high pull-out strength (357N). Knotted and Knotless options.
- FILAHOOK™ Soft Anchor: All-suture UHMWPE. 1.2mm to 2.9mm. Minimally invasive, high pull-out strength (349N).
- ROTAFIX Knotless (PEEK+PEEK / PEEK+TI): Eliminates knots. Eyelet holds up to 8 sutures. Tension visualized/adjusted.

2. Knee Arthroscopy (Ligament Fixation):
- FLEXIBUTTON™ Adjustable Loop System: Titanium button (Ti-6Al-4V) + USP #5 UHMWPE loop. Intraoperatively customizable.
- ENDOSTUD™ Fixed Loop System: Stable non-adjustable fixation. Tensile strength > 2200N. Large button for cortical expansion.
- FERENCE-TI™ Titanium Interference Screw: Fully threaded blunt-tip to prevent graft laceration. 5mm to 12mm sizes.
- FERENCE-PEEK™ Interference Screw: Radiolucent/MRI-compatible. Revision-ability.
- BIO-FERENCE™ (Bio-Composite / Bio-Absorbable): PLGA+Beta-TCP or PLLA+HA. Osteoconductive properties.
- MENISCAL DARN™ (Inside-Out): UHMWPE sutures for complex tears. Flexible needle design.
- RAPID-FIX™ (All-Inside): Minimally invasive, needle-shrouded system, PEEK anchors.

3. Persist™ Arthroscopy Equipment:
- PERSIST™ 4K Camera System: 1/2.5" Sony UHD CMOS (8.4M pixels). 3840x2160 resolution. Built-in 100W LED. USB recording.
- PERSIST™ FHD Camera System: 1/2.3" Sony CMOS. 1080 TVL. IPX8 waterproof head.
- PERSIST™ Shaver System: 1000–5500 RPM. Oscillation and Linear modes. Touch screen interface.
- PERSIST™ RF Plasma System: Ablation/Coagulation at 40–70°C. Level 1–9 sophisticated operation.
- PERSIST™ Medical Monitors: 32-inch 4K and HD options. 1200:1 contrast ratio.
- PERSIST™ LED Cold Light Source: 2800 lm, CRI > 90, Sleeping function.

4. Specialized Accessories:
- Passing Pin: Nitinol wire (2.4mm). Diamond or Drill tip with eyelet.
- U-Staple: Ti-6Al-4V ELI titanium for tendon-to-bone fixation. 8mm/9mm/10mm.

Manufacturer:
Meril Life Sciences / Sports Engine
Vapi - 396 191, Gujarat, India.
"Precision | Strength | Reliability"

full_raw_transcription:
MERIL SPORTS ENGINE - UNLEASH THE POTENTIAL
Sports Medicine & Arthroscopy Portfolio Reconstruction

1. Shoulder Arthroscopy (Ligament Anchors):
- INSTAREP-TI™ Titanium Anchor: Ti-6Al-4V (Grade 5 ELI). Self-drilling/screw-in. 2mm/3mm. Preloaded with UHMWPE suture.
- ROTAFIX-TI™ Headless Titanium Anchor: 4.5mm to 6.5mm. Advanced thread for cancellous/osteoporotic bone. Independent fiber channels.
- INSTAREP-BIO™ / ROTAFIX-BIO™: Bio-composite (PLGA + Beta-TCP). Gradual resorption and bone remodeling. Dual threads.
- INSTAREP-PEEK™ / ROTAFIX-PEEK™: Biostable non-absorbable PEEK. Low friction, high pull-out strength (357N). Knotted and Knotless options.
- FILAHOOK™ Soft Anchor: All-suture UHMWPE. 1.2mm to 2.9mm. Minimally invasive, high pull-out strength (349N).
- ROTAFIX Knotless (PEEK+PEEK / PEEK+TI): Eliminates knots. Eyelet holds up to 8 sutures. Tension visualized/adjusted.

2. Knee Arthroscopy (Ligament Fixation):
- FLEXIBUTTON™ Adjustable Loop System: Titanium button (Ti-6Al-4V) + USP #5 UHMWPE loop. Intraoperatively customizable.
- ENDOSTUD™ Fixed Loop System: Stable non-adjustable fixation. Tensile strength > 2200N. Large button for cortical expansion.
- FERENCE-TI™ Titanium Interference Screw: Fully threaded blunt-tip to prevent graft laceration. 5mm to 12mm sizes.
- FERENCE-PEEK™ Interference Screw: Radiolucent/MRI-compatible. Revision-ability.
- BIO-FERENCE™ (Bio-Composite / Bio-Absorbable): PLGA+Beta-TCP or PLLA+HA. Osteoconductive properties.
- MENISCAL DARN™ (Inside-Out): UHMWPE sutures for complex tears. Flexible needle design.
- RAPID-FIX™ (All-Inside): Minimally invasive, needle-shrouded system, PEEK anchors.

3. Persist™ Arthroscopy Equipment:
- PERSIST™ 4K Camera System: 1/2.5" Sony UHD CMOS (8.4M pixels). 3840x2160 resolution. Built-in 100W LED. USB recording.
- PERSIST™ FHD Camera System: 1/2.3" Sony CMOS. 1080 TVL. IPX8 waterproof head.
- PERSIST™ Shaver System: 1000–5500 RPM. Oscillation and Linear modes. Touch screen interface.
- PERSIST™ RF Plasma System: Ablation/Coagulation at 40–70°C. Level 1–9 sophisticated operation.
- PERSIST™ Medical Monitors: 32-inch 4K and HD options. 1200:1 contrast ratio.
- PERSIST™ LED Cold Light Source: 2800 lm, CRI > 90, Sleeping function.

4. Specialized Accessories:
- Passing Pin: Nitinol wire (2.4mm). Diamond or Drill tip with eyelet.
- U-Staple: Ti-6Al-4V ELI titanium for tendon-to-bone fixation. 8mm/9mm/10mm.

Manufacturer:
Meril Life Sciences / Sports Engine
Vapi - 396 191, Gujarat, India.
"Precision | Strength | Reliability"
